ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "total_products" INTEGER /* Total number of products in the order */,
  "sub_total" REAL /* Subtotal of the order before tax and shipping */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., pending, paid, refunded) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image URL of the product */,
  "product_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provides the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date and time the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., condiments, sauces) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "product_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time the review was left */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the product (1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_tracking" (
  "order_tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order tracking entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being tracked */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used to ship the order */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_tracking_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
